channel.title: Security on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Security on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: PrestaShop 9.1.3 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.1.3 is now available. This is a small security maintenance release for the 9.1 branch that brings in the latest patch versions of two key upstream dependencies, Symfony and Twig, following their coordinated security advisories published on 2026-05-20.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.2.6 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 8.2.6 is available. This security patch for the 8.2 branch addresses a Critical stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. Updating as soon as possible is strongly recommended.

item.title: PrestaShop 9.1.1 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.1.1 is available. This security patch for the 9.1 branch addresses a Critical stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability. Updating as soon as possible is strongly recommended.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.2.5 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 8.2.5 is available. This security patch for the 8.2 branch addresses two vulnerabilities: a stored XSS issue in back office templates and an improper use of the validation framework.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.2.4 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 8.2.4 is available. This maintenance release for the 8.2 branch brings security improvements to further harden your store.

item.title: PrestaShop 9.0.3 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 9.0.3 is now available! This third maintenance release continues to refine the PrestaShop 9 series, delivering important security improvements along with numerous bug fixes and enhancements.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.2.3 is available
item.description: PrestaShop 8.2.3 is available. It is a security‑driven patch release for the 8.2 branch. Its primary goal is to address an email enumeration vulnerability in the back office password reset feature. A handful of low-risk improvements and bug fixes that have already been validated have also been included.

item.title: SQL Injection attacks alert and security enhancements for PrestaShop
item.description: A recent wave of attacks has targeted PrestaShop stores, leveraging SQL Injection vulnerabilities in third-party modules to compromise data security. Malicious actors exploit these vulnerabilities to inject harmful code into the PrestaShop database, enabling the theft of sensitive customer information by loading unauthorized JavaScript scripts.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.1.6 Is Available
item.description: A new patch version for PrestaShop 8.1 is now available. This maintenance release fixes 2 security issues.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.1.4 Is Available
item.description: It’s been decided to release a security patch for version 8.1 of PrestaShop.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.1.3 Is Available
item.description: We are entering the new year with the release of PrestaShop 8.1.3. The latest update for PrestaShop 8.1 is now available. This version brings two security updates, addresses close to 30 known issues, and introduces various enhancements.

item.title: PrestaShop 1.7.8.11 Is Available
item.description: A security patch for PrestaShop 1.7 is now available.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.1.1 Is Available
item.description: The first patch for PrestaShop 8.1 is available. This release contains a few security fixes, so we highly recommend you to upgrade your shop as soon as possible.

item.title: PrestaShop 8.0.5 Is Available
item.description: The fifth patch version for PrestaShop 8 is now available to download! This release contains a few security fixes, so we highly recommend you to upgrade your shop as soon as possible.

item.title: PrestaShop 1.7.8.10 Is Available
item.description: A security patch for PrestaShop 1.7 is now available.
